author: doll-agent
content: Implemented nanargmin() and nanargmax() in ferray-stats::reductions::nan_aware. Both raise InvalidValue on all-NaN slices (matching NumPy's ValueError). Axis-mode uses a sentinel u64::MAX to flag all-NaN lanes, then post-scans the reduce result. Re-exported via ferray-stats lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate. 5 unit tests cover skip-NaN/all-NaN/2-D axis paths.
